text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
On a day when it's been raining cats<n>and dogs
since morning...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Awww... It's raining again?! I'mso sorry! This is all my fault!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Well... Rice is getting all worked up<n>because she
thinks she's to blame<n>for the cherry blossom
picnic getting<n>rained out...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
It rained last week and the week<n>before too... It's
my fault... I brought<n>the bad luck again.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
That's not true! This event is over,<n>but there'll be
other ones!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: She's right! Let's go next week!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
No, I can't... You two should go<n>without me. It'll
just rain again if I'm<n>there.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Oh, Rice...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Um, do you know of any places<n>where we can
have a cherry blossom<n>picnic even if it's raining?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
A botanical garden inside a<n>greenhouse springs
to mind, but I'm<n>not sure it'd be wise to send
them off<n>in such heavy rain.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm, if only there was some kind<n>of flower
garden that we could go to in<n>any weather!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oh, I know! Guys! Come with me!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Urara, wait! It's pouring rain outside!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara and the others run off into<n>the
torrential rain. Worried about how<n>they'll fare, I
decide to follow them.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: We're... at an aquarium? Why?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Lookie there! Ta-daaah! A flower<n>garden!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Those are... jellyfish.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but look at the poster! "The<n>Fantastical
Jellyfish Exhibition: An<n>Underwater Flower
Garden."

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I see, the selection of jellyfish here<n>look like
flowers floating in the water.<n>How dreamy!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: You're right, they do look like flowers<n>in bloom.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: They're so beautiful...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Right?! The rain can't stop us in here!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... I was wallowing so hard in my<n>sorrow
that I couldn't come up with<n>any other ideas.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
You're so great at finding ways to be<n>happy,
Urara. You always amaze me...
choice_data_list: Let's keep looking on the bright side!

Happiness could be waiting right around the
corner.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
The bright side... Yeah, you're right!<n>I-I'll try to do
that!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I know! If you say you're happy,then more happiness is sure to comeyour way!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Like this... It's raining! I'm so happy!<n>You should
give it a shot too, Rice! Go<n>on!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I-I'm so happy?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Uh-huh! Here I am at the aquarium<n>with Rice and
Rob Roy! I'm so happy!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Y-yes, I'm so happy! Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Is it the power of words or Haru<n>Urara's
positivity? Either way, Rice<n>Shower is positively
beaming.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Y-you think so? Right around the<n>corner, huh...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
You mean that poster there? For the<n>dolphin
meet-and-greet?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I bet we'll all make some great<n>memories if we
go and play with the<n>dolphins!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The dolphins perform huge leaps in<n>time with the
jolly music. But then...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Squee, squee! Squeee... SPLASH!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Oooh... I'm so sorry. I got all of you<n>splashed
with water!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Don't be sorry! That's what dolphin<n>shows are
all about!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! That was so much fun! We<n>should go
and see the dolphins again<n>sometime!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
For sure, Urara! I'd love to go again<n>with you
both.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Thanks so much, you two!
